tasks.subject: Task 1: Update spec — IDB approach + write-uid bootstrap
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace spec's "memory-only" IDB section with "separate IDB database" + record host-uid bootstrap via collectionGroup.

**Files:** Modify docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-15-public-notebook-share-design.md

**Verify:** `git log --oneline -1 docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-15-public-notebook-share-design.md`

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-15-public-notebook-share-design.md"],"verifyCommand":"git log --oneline -1 docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-15-public-notebook-share-design.md","acceptanceCriteria":["IDB section says separate tomboy-web-guest","Bootstrap explains collectionGroup('publicConfig')","Rules section confirms collectionGroup compat"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Firestore rules + composite index
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land public-notes rules + (public, serverUpdatedAt) collectionGroup index.

**Files:** firestore.rules, firestore.indexes.json

**Verify:** `node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('firestore.indexes.json'))" && echo OK`

```json:metadata
{"files":["firestore.rules","firestore.indexes.json"],"verifyCommand":"node -e \"JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('firestore.indexes.json'))\" && echo OK","acceptanceCriteria":["4 allow blocks per spec","publicConfig rule","collectionGroup notes (public,serverUpdatedAt) index"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Guest mode rune store + ensureGuestSignedIn
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single source of truth for app mode + anonymous Firebase auth helper.

**Files:** Create app/src/lib/stores/guestMode.svelte.ts; modify app/src/lib/firebase/app.ts; create app/tests/unit/stores/guestMode.test.ts

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- guestMode`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/stores/guestMode.svelte.ts","app/src/lib/firebase/app.ts","app/tests/unit/stores/guestMode.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- guestMode","acceptanceCriteria":["mode.value typed 'visitor'|'guest'|'host'","detectAndSet derives from Dropbox token + localStorage name","ensureGuestSignedIn signs in anonymously, idempotent","3 mode derivation tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: publicConfig client module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Read/write publicConfig from host and discover host uid from guest via collectionGroup.

**Files:** Create app/src/lib/sync/firebase/publicConfig.ts; create app/tests/unit/sync/firebase/publicConfig.test.ts

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- publicConfig`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/sync/firebase/publicConfig.ts","app/tests/unit/sync/firebase/publicConfig.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- publicConfig","acceptanceCriteria":["discoverPublicConfigForGuest via collectionGroup limit 1","readPublicConfigForHost","writePublicConfigAsHost with merge:true","getCachedPublicConfig accessor","4+ tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Note payload `public` field + auto-public on push
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Firestore push computes public from (notebook, sharedNotebooks).

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/sync/firebase/notePayload.ts; modify app/src/lib/sync/firebase/noteSyncClient.firestore.ts; modify or create app/tests/unit/sync/firebase/notePayload.test.ts

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- notePayload && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/sync/firebase/notePayload.ts","app/src/lib/sync/firebase/noteSyncClient.firestore.ts","app/tests/unit/sync/firebase/notePayload.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- notePayload && npm run check","acceptanceCriteria":["FirestoreNotePayload has public:boolean","noteToFirestorePayload(note, sharedNotebooks) computes public","All call sites updated","Tests cover 3 cases"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Guest IDB + guest-mode sync wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Guest mode uses tomboy-web-guest IDB, queries Firestore via collectionGroup(public==true), writes to host namespace.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/storage/db.ts; modify app/src/lib/sync/firebase/install.ts; modify app/src/lib/sync/firebase/noteSyncClient.firestore.ts; create app/tests/unit/storage/dbName.test.ts

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- dbName && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/storage/db.ts","app/src/lib/sync/firebase/install.ts","app/src/lib/sync/firebase/noteSyncClient.firestore.ts","app/tests/unit/storage/dbName.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- dbName && npm run check","acceptanceCriteria":["db.ts setDbMode/getDbName parameterized","subscribeAllPublicNotesAfter adapter","Install branches on mode.value","Guest watermark key firebaseGuestLastSyncAt","Guest mode unconditionally enabled"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: `/welcome` landing route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Visitor landing page with name input + Dropbox login button.

**Files:** Create app/src/routes/welcome/+page.svelte; modify app/src/routes/+layout.svelte

**Verify:** Manual smoke per plan.

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/routes/welcome/+page.svelte","app/src/routes/+layout.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run check","acceptanceCriteria":["/welcome renders form","Empty name shows error","Submit sets localStorage + redirect to /","Dropbox button starts OAuth","Visitors redirected to /welcome"]}
```

tasks.description:

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/components/TopNav.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run check","acceptanceCriteria":["Mode-aware navItems","Gear button omitted from DOM in guest","theme-guest CSS class","Host mode unchanged"]}
```

**Goal:** Guest + button creates a note already tagged with sharedNotebooks[0].

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/components/TopNav.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run check","acceptanceCriteria":["Guest path assignNotebook sharedNotebooks[0]","Empty shared list → toast, no create","Host path unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Guest guards (note + favorites + routes + home + link)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Per-note guard, favorites filter, route blocks (settings/admin/desktop/sleepnote), home redirect, internal-link toast.

**Files:** Modify app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte; app/src/lib/components/TopNav.svelte; app/src/routes/+layout.svelte; app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check`; manual smoke per path.

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte","app/src/lib/components/TopNav.svelte","app/src/routes/+layout.svelte","app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run check","acceptanceCriteria":["Non-public /note/{guid} → /notes","Favorites filtered","Settings/admin/desktop/sleepnote → /notes","Home → first shared notebook's recent note","Link click miss → toast"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Settings — "공유" tab
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Host toggles notebooks public from settings. Batched updates + publicConfig rewrite.

**Files:** Create app/src/lib/sync/firebase/publishNotebook.ts; modify app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check`; manual end-to-end.

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/sync/firebase/publishNotebook.ts","app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run check","acceptanceCriteria":["Tab type union has 'share'","setNotebookPublic batched writeBatch (≤500)","publicConfig.sharedNotebooks updated","Per-notebook note count shown","Progress bar during batch"]}
```
